paper_citation: We performed full automated validation on all 2,075 PRIMARY Ground Truth accounts (Max Outgoing ≥ 0.5 ETH). Cashout destination addresses were cross-referenced against a curated list of 436 documented exchange and mixer addresses (Etherscan Label Cloud + OFAC SDN List). 100 accounts (4.8%) directed funds to confirmed CEX/mixer destinations. An additional 1,210 accounts (58.3%) transferred ≥5.0 ETH to undocumented addresses — a pattern consistent with consolidation to fresh intermediate wallets. Combined (CONFIRMED_CEX + PROBABLE): 1,310/2,075 (63.1%, 95% Wilson CI: [61.0%, 65.2%]). The remaining 765 accounts (36.9%) transferred 0.5–5.0 ETH to undocumented addresses (UNCERTAIN). 253 out-of-domain SMALL_MICRO accounts (<0.5 ETH) are excluded from primary validation and reported separately.
